theme: Light theme preferred, dark theme support
archetype: ORGANIC & EARTHY mixed with SWISS & HIGH-CONTRAST

typography.heading: Chivo
rules: Use Chivo for all Headings (font-black for large impact, font-light for elegance).
Use IBM Plex Sans for body text and dashboard data.
Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk for headings.
Use uppercase + wide tracking for overlines and labels.
Do NOT use generic text centering. Only center if it improves visual balance.
Never use pure black or gray, tint neutral grays slightly with green/blue.
Limit color palette: neutrals for 90% of UI, primary/accent for 10%.
No generic full-screen gradients. Use solid colors with crisp borders.
Ensure contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text.
CRITICAL: DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, or surfaces with content under it.

surfaces: GRID BORDERS: Use for Data-heavy Dashboards and Features Sections. Expose the skeleton with subtle borders on right/bottom of grid items.
GLASSMORPHISM: High-end glass (backdrop-blur-xl) with 1px delicate inner stroke for sticky headers.
NEUMORPHISM: Avoid soft UI everywhere. Use sharp 1px borders to ground components.
shadows: Hover states should have a slight lift `-translate-y-1` and `shadow-md`.

component_name: Dashboard Metrics Card: Flat background, 1px subtle border, sharp or slightly rounded corners (max 8px).
Waste Listing Card: High-contrast title, clear image max-h-[200px], prominent price/quantity.
Data Charts: Use Recharts with monochromatic green/earthy scales.
CTAs: Primary brand color, pill-shaped or sharp with interaction animations.

grids.marketing_page: MODE A: THE TETRIS GRID - Asymmetric grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8).
grids.dashboard: MODE B: High Density Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Use full width/height for widgets.

layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing: Use 2-3x more spacing (p-8, p-12). Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6).
layouts.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, labels, and dense content. Center-align hero sections if it improves balance. Optical alignment over geometrical.
rules: Direct Children Only: Grid items MUST be direct children of grid containers.
Override default stretch behavior on grid with `align-items: start`. Add `align-self: stretch` to individual items which need stretch.
Always include hover states for interactive elements (background change + text color change).
Use specific transitions (e.g., `transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease`). NEVER use `transition: all`.
Entrance animations for dashboard widgets and marketplace listings (staggered).

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="listing-card-button"`).

images: Mobile Height Limit: Images MUST NOT exceed 80vh on mobile.
icons: Use `@phosphor-icons/react` for high-end duotone weight in marketing pages.

3d_libraries: TSParticles: For subtle background life in the marketing hero section (if required).

image_urls.description: Overhead crane sorting scrap metal in an industrial recycling facility.
Farmer harvesting wheat, representing crop residue.
Clean nature forest landscape, representing environmental impact.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Write ONLY .js or .jsx files. Do not use .tsx or .ts. The environment is configured for JS.
Update `tailwind.config.js` to include Chivo and IBM Plex Sans fonts.
Update `index.css` to import the fonts from Google Fonts or similar, and apply the color variables.
Use standard Shadcn components but override their styles to match the ORGANIC & EARTHY theme.
Remove `.App { text-align: center; }` from any CSS file if it exists.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Do not use generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, or uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp) with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, transitions).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
